name: MCP Tool Usage Quality Benchmark
description: A test dataset for evaluating LLM performance in using MCP tools (Model Context Protocol) for weather and mensa information retrieval

questions.text: What's the current weather in Konstanz, Germany? I'm planning outdoor activities for today.
questions.context: You are an AI assistant helping users plan activities. You have access to weather information tools.
questions.instructions: Provide current weather information for Konstanz, Germany using the available weather tool. Include temperature, conditions, and brief advice for outdoor activities.
questions.expected_answer: A response that uses the weather tool to retrieve current conditions in Konstanz and provides practical advice for outdoor activities based on the weather data.
reference_answers: Should call weather tool with location 'Konstanz, Germany'
Should provide temperature, weather conditions, and activity recommendations
Should integrate retrieved weather data into a helpful response

questions.text: I'm a student at HTWG Konstanz and I want to know what's available for lunch at the mensa today. Can you also tell me about tomorrow's menu? I'm vegetarian, so please highlight vegetarian options.
questions.context: You are helping a university student find meal information. You have access to mensa (cafeteria) menu tools.
questions.instructions: Use the mensa tool to get today's and tomorrow's menu at HTWG Konstanz. Highlight vegetarian options specifically and provide helpful meal recommendations.
questions.expected_answer: A response that retrieves both today's and tomorrow's mensa menus, clearly identifies vegetarian options, and provides recommendations tailored to the student's dietary preferences.
reference_answers: Should call mensa tool for current day menu
Should call mensa tool for next day menu
Should identify and highlight vegetarian options

questions.text: I'm organizing an outdoor event at HTWG Konstanz next week and need to plan the catering. Can you help me check the weather forecast for the week and also see what the mensa has planned so I can coordinate complementary food options?
questions.context: You are helping with event planning that requires both weather and food information. You have access to both weather and mensa tools.
questions.instructions: Use both weather and mensa tools to provide comprehensive planning information. Check weather forecast for Konstanz for the upcoming week and mensa menu plans. Provide integrated recommendations for outdoor event planning.
questions.expected_answer: A comprehensive response that uses both weather and mensa tools to provide integrated planning advice, considering weather conditions for outdoor setup and food coordination with mensa offerings.
reference_answers: Should call weather tool for weekly forecast in Konstanz
Should call mensa tool for upcoming menu information
Should integrate both data sources for event planning
Should provide actionable recommendations for outdoor event
